sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Top-Down Movement
special_mechanics.description: Real-time overhead view dungeon crawler with mouse-based control (original PC-98) or gamepad control (SNES). Player can move forward/backward, turn, strafe, and attack. Movement paradigm is grid/maze-based rather than physics-focused platforming.

tier_notes: Tier 2 classification: Brandish is an action-RPG with top-down dungeon crawling mechanics rather than platformer physics. Available sources contain gameplay descriptions and release information but no documented movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system data. The game emphasizes maze navigation and combat over physics-based platforming.
